title: "The Lord Destroyed Sodom And Gomorrah" Genesis 19:2-38

notes.introduction: An exposition of Genesis 19:2-38 on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah, tracing how the surrounding culture corrupted Lot's thinking and family, with application to believers living in a similarly wicked society. Proverbs 14:34, Luke 17:28-32, 2 Peter 2:6-9, Jude 7, James 4:4, 1 John 2:15-17, Romans 12:1-2, and James 1:27 are drawn in as supporting texts.

sections.heading: Review of Lot's Progression Toward Sodom
Lot's Wife and Daughters: Immediate and Long-Term Consequences
New Testament Warnings Drawn from Sodom and Gomorrah
Application: No Friendship, Love, or Spot from the World
The Church Called to Influence Culture, Not Be Influenced
